details: Combosquat package impersonating the chai assertion library. On require(), index.js spawns a detached background Node.js process that executes lib/initializeCaller.js. That file decodes a base64-embedded URL (hxxps://tomato-brunhilda-40[.]tiiny[.]site/index[.]json) and fetches it via HTTPS with a custom HTTP header (x-secret-key: _). The response body's.cookie field is passed to the Function constructor with require injected, giving the remote server arbitrary code execution inside the installer's Node.js process. The payload is fetched from a free static hosting service (tiiny[.]site). The package retries the fetch up to 5 times on failure.
